_instructions: Copy this folder to clients/your_client_name/ and fill out all fields. This is the single source of truth that all AI agents read before running any task for this client.

brand_voice.persona: e.g. A trusted advisor speaking to small business owners
brand_voice.writing_style_notes: e.g. Use short sentences. Avoid jargon. Always lead with the benefit.
brand_voice.cta_style: e.g. 'Get Started Today' / 'Book a Free Call' / 'Try It Free'

target_audience.primary_persona: e.g. Marketing managers at B2B SaaS companies with 50-200 employees
pain_points: e.g. Struggling to rank for competitive keywords
e.g. Low organic traffic despite publishing regularly

primary_keywords: e.g. best CRM for small business

reporting._note: Set custom_report_template to the filename in /templates/ if client has a preferred report format
